title_zh: 雪山之间的村落与红酒庄园
title_en: Villages & Vineyards Between the Snow Mountains
subtitle_zh: 香格里拉高原红酒庄园 & 隐于山谷的藏族村落 · 5天4晚微醺之旅
subtitle_en: High-Altitude Wine Estates & Hidden Tibetan Villages — A 5-Day Journey of Quiet Intoxication
lodge_zh: 香格里拉匠庐・赛朵游牧、梅里雪山匠庐・雾浓顶
lodge_en: JiangLu Saiduo Nomad (Shangri-La) & JiangLu Wunongding (Meili Snow Mountain)
route_zh: 香格里拉 — 奔子栏 — 德钦·雾浓顶 — 茨中村 — 曲登阁 — 红坡村 — 香格里拉
route_en: Shangri-La — Benzilan — Deqin (Wunongding) — Cizhong Village — Quden Pagoda — Hongpo Village — Shangri-La
intro_zh: 香格里拉地区的葡萄酒种植与酿造拥有超过150年的历史，20世纪90年代兴起了现代化葡萄酒产业。站在海拔3000米的香格里拉高原，呼吸间是雪山融化的清凉，抬眼间是经幡飘扬的虔诚，而舌尖上，一场关于风土的奇迹正在悄然酝酿——这不是普通的旅程，这是遇见香格里拉的另一种维度。当飞机降落在香格里拉，你以为抵达的是终点，却不知，这只是一场风土对话的序章。
intro_en: Winemaking in the Shangri-La highlands reaches back more than 150 years, with a modern industry blossoming in the 1990s. Stand at 3,000 metres and the air carries the chill of melting snow; lift your eyes and prayer flags ripple against the sky; and on the tongue, a quiet miracle of terroir is taking shape. This is not an ordinary journey — it is another dimension of Shangri-La. When the plane touches down, you may think you have arrived at the destination. In truth, this is only the prologue to a long conversation with the land.

items.title_zh: 香格里拉接机/接站 · 赛朵游牧入住
items.title_en: Arrival in Shangri-La & Check-in at Saiduo Nomad
items.desc_zh: 抵达后专车接机/接站（车程约10公里，20分钟左右），入住香格里拉匠庐・赛朵游牧。酒店静卧于草原湿地畔，遥望石卡雪山连绵。奉上第一杯高原酥油茶，先认识这里的阳光与风土。晚宴选用高原食材，由主厨呈现；餐后篝火舞动，让身体由内而外温暖。餐食：晚餐。住宿：香格里拉匠庐・赛朵游牧。
items.desc_en: On arrival, a private transfer (about 10 km, 20 minutes) brings you to JiangLu Saiduo Nomad, set beside grassland wetlands with the Shika Snow Mountain stretching across the horizon. A first bowl of highland butter tea welcomes you — an introduction to the sun and soil of this place. Dinner showcases highland ingredients in the chef's hands, followed by dancing around the bonfire that warms you from within. Meals: dinner. Stay: JiangLu Saiduo Nomad, Shangri-La.

items.title_zh: 扎西核桃树酒庄 — 朵木杦庄 — 雾浓顶
items.title_en: Tashi Walnut Tree Estate — Domu Estate — Wunongding
items.desc_zh: 驾英力士掷弹兵沿214国道穿行（车程约180公里，4小时左右），左手是5000米的雪山，右手是2000米的葡萄园。在奔子栏停下，走进酿酒房，看橡木桶静静呼吸，听藏族阿姐讲述葡萄酒的风味；探访中国藏式车库酒庄扎西核桃树酒庄与高海拔雷司令白葡标杆朵木杦庄。傍晚抵达德钦雾浓顶，梅里十三峰在卡瓦格博的注视下揭开面纱。餐食：早、中、晚餐。住宿：梅里雪山匠庐・雾浓顶。
items.desc_en: Behind the wheel of the Ineos Grenadier, follow National Highway 214 (about 180 km, 4 hours): 5,000-metre peaks on the left, 2,000-metre vineyards on the right. Pause in Benzilan to enter a cellar where oak barrels breathe and a Tibetan host speaks of the wine's character. Visit the Tashi Walnut Tree Estate — a Tibetan-style 'garage winery' — and Domu Estate, a benchmark for high-altitude Riesling. By dusk, reach Wunongding in Deqin as the Thirteen Peaks of Meili lift their veil beneath the gaze of Kawagebo. Meals: breakfast, lunch, dinner. Stay: JiangLu Wunongding, Meili Snow Mountain.

items.title_zh: 雾浓顶煨桑祈福 — 茨中葡萄酒之家 — 茨中教堂
items.title_en: Wunongding Sang Ritual — Cizhong House of Wine — Cizhong Church
items.desc_zh: 清晨在雾浓顶白塔前撒五谷、烧香枝，一场煨桑仪式将祈愿遥寄神山，若遇日照金山的一刻，足以祈祷一整年的幸运。告别梅里晨雾，沿澜沧江河谷前行（车程约150公里，3小时左右），抵达藏地小众秘境茨中村。1867年法国传教士溯江而来，在此建起哥特式天主教堂，并带来法国波尔多的玫瑰蜜葡萄与古法酿酒技艺；如今玫瑰蜜在法国本土已绝迹，却在这片海拔2000米的干热河谷中成为世界仅存的珍稀葡萄藤。走进茨中葡萄酒之家与百年茨中教堂，触摸中西文化交融的时光。餐食：早、中、晚餐。住宿：梅里雪山匠庐・雾浓顶。
items.desc_en: At dawn, before the white stupa of Wunongding, scatter the five grains and light juniper branches — a sang smoke offering that carries your wishes to the sacred mountain; should the golden sunrise touch Meili, the moment is said to bless an entire year. Leaving the morning mist, follow the Lancang (Mekong) river valley (about 150 km, 3 hours) to the hidden Tibetan village of Cizhong. In 1867 French missionaries came upriver and raised a Gothic Catholic church here, bringing Bordeaux's Rose Honey grape and old-world winemaking. Now extinct in France, Rose Honey survives only in this dry-hot valley at 2,000 metres — the world's last of its vines. Step into the Cizhong House of Wine and the century-old church, where East and West quietly intertwine. Meals: breakfast, lunch, dinner. Stay: JiangLu Wunongding, Meili Snow Mountain.

items.title_zh: 曲登阁绕塔 — 红坡村 — 藏民家访
items.title_en: Quden Pagoda Kora — Hongpo Village — Tibetan Home Visit
items.desc_zh: 在曲登阁跟随信徒顺时针绕佛塔三周，求得朝圣神山的法门，如同通往圣地大门的钥匙（车程约250公里，5小时左右）。当车子从214国道拐进红坡村，时间变得稠密而缓慢。学做糌粑，青稞粉从指缝漏下；桌上是去年雪水、今年青稞酿成的青稞酒，一桌藏族家宴吃出久违的家的味道。这里有遗世独立的红坡寺与神山脚下的避世村落。傍晚返回赛朵游牧。餐食：早、中、晚餐。住宿：香格里拉匠庐・赛朵游牧。
items.desc_en: At the Quden Pagoda, walk three clockwise circuits with the pilgrims to receive the 'key' to the sacred mountain (about 250 km, 5 hours). As the vehicle turns off Highway 214 into Hongpo Village, time grows dense and slow. Learn to make tsampa, barley flour slipping through your fingers; on the table, barley wine made from 'last year's snowmelt and this year's grain', and a Tibetan family feast that tastes of home. Here stand the solitary Hongpo Monastery and a village hidden at the foot of the sacred peak. Return to Saiduo Nomad by evening. Meals: breakfast, lunch, dinner. Stay: JiangLu Saiduo Nomad, Shangri-La.

items.desc_zh: 携香格里拉的风与酒，把整片高原带回城市。早餐后专车送机/送站（车程约10公里，20分钟左右）。旅途在此刻终结，但关于自由的想象，永不散场。餐食：早餐。
items.desc_en: Carry the wind and wine of Shangri-La home, the whole highland tucked within you. After breakfast, a private transfer to the airport or station (about 10 km, 20 minutes). The journey ends here — but the dream of freedom never closes. Meals: breakfast.

lodge.name_zh: 香格里拉匠庐・赛朵游牧 & 梅里雪山匠庐・雾浓顶
lodge.positioning_zh: 隐于雪山与草原之间的野奢度假酒店
lodge.positioning_en: Wild-luxury retreats hidden between snow mountains and grassland
lodge.desc_zh: “赛朵游牧”取自藏语，意为“草原上的野花”，看似平凡却生生不息——在最寂静处生长，向最辽阔处归来。赛朵游牧静卧于草原湿地畔，遥望石卡雪山连绵；梅里雪山匠庐・雾浓顶则正对梅里十三峰，于卡瓦格博的注视下等候日照金山。两家匠庐皆以隐奢慢旅为理念，用心挑选高原食材，信任主厨的手艺、味觉与审美，让每个细节都成为体验的一部分。
lodge.desc_en: 'Saiduo Nomad' comes from the Tibetan for 'wildflower of the grassland' — humble in appearance yet endlessly alive, growing in the stillest places and returning toward the widest horizons. Saiduo Nomad rests beside grassland wetlands facing the Shika Snow Mountain, while JiangLu Wunongding looks directly onto the Thirteen Peaks of Meili, waiting beneath Kawagebo for the golden sunrise. Both lodges embody JiangLu's philosophy of hidden-luxury slow travel: highland ingredients chosen with care, full trust in the chef's craft and palate, every detail folded into the experience.

stats.value: 两家匠庐各连住2晚 / 2 nights at each lodge
英力士掷弹兵 / Ineos Grenadier

experiences.title_zh: 高原红酒庄园探访 · 风土三章
experiences.title_en: High-Altitude Wine Estates — Three Chapters of Terroir
experiences.desc_zh: 深入香格里拉百年葡萄酒源地，探访高海拔雷司令白葡的标杆朵木杦庄、中国藏式车库酒庄扎西核桃树酒庄，以及藏地百年酿酒源地茨中葡萄酒之家。在橡木桶静静呼吸的酿酒房里，听藏族阿姐讲述属于这片高原的葡萄酒风味——左手5000米雪山，右手2000米葡萄园，葡萄串联起村民与酿酒师的纸短情长。
experiences.desc_en: Go to the source of Shangri-La's 150-year wine heritage across three estates: Domu Estate, a benchmark for high-altitude Riesling; the Tashi Walnut Tree Estate, a Tibetan-style 'garage winery'; and the Cizhong House of Wine, cradle of a century of Tibetan winemaking. In cellars where oak barrels breathe, a Tibetan host unfolds the character of these highland wines — 5,000-metre peaks on one side, 2,000-metre vineyards on the other, the grapevine binding villagers and vintners together.

experiences.title_zh: 茨中教堂 · 世界仅存的玫瑰蜜葡萄藤
experiences.title_en: Cizhong Church & the World's Last Rose Honey Vines
experiences.desc_zh: 1867年法国传教士溯澜沧江而来，在茨中村建起哥特式天主教堂，并带来波尔多的玫瑰蜜葡萄。如今法国本土的玫瑰蜜早已绝迹，却在这片海拔2000米的干热河谷中成为世界仅存的珍稀葡萄藤。教堂哥特式尖顶之下，中式飞檐瓦顶与藏式雕花悄然融合，十字架与宝瓶纹饰相映；殿内百年手绘圣经壁画、汉式对联与藏文经卷并存，是一段中西文化交融的活档案。
experiences.desc_en: In 1867, French missionaries came up the Lancang River and built a Gothic Catholic church in Cizhong, bringing Bordeaux's Rose Honey grape. Extinct now in France, the variety survives here in the dry-hot valley at 2,000 metres — the world's last living Rose Honey vines. Beneath Gothic spires, Chinese flying-eave roofs and Tibetan carvings merge; the cross meets the auspicious-vase motif. Inside, century-old hand-painted biblical murals share the space with Chinese couplets and Tibetan scripture — a living archive of cultures intertwined.

experiences.title_zh: 梅里雪山 · 雾浓顶煨桑与日照金山
experiences.title_en: Meili Snow Mountain — Sang Ritual & the Golden Sunrise
experiences.desc_zh: 傍晚走进德钦，梅里十三峰映入眼帘；在卡瓦格博的注视下歇于雾浓顶，等候新的一天。清晨在白塔前撒五谷、烧香枝，一场煨桑仪式将祈愿遥寄神山。当梅里雪山接住晨光、日照金山的那一刻，来自天地的力量令人心生向往与崇敬，短暂却足以祈祷一整年的幸运。
experiences.desc_en: At dusk in Deqin, the Thirteen Peaks of Meili rise before you; beneath Kawagebo's gaze you rest at Wunongding to await the new day. At dawn, before the white stupa, scatter the five grains and light juniper — a sang smoke offering carrying your prayers to the sacred mountain. When the first light strikes Meili and the peaks turn molten gold, the power of heaven and earth stirs longing and reverence — a fleeting moment said to bless a whole year.

experiences.title_zh: 曲登阁绕塔 · 红坡村藏民家访
experiences.title_en: Quden Pagoda Kora & a Hongpo Village Home Visit
experiences.desc_zh: 在曲登阁跟随信徒顺时针绕佛塔三周，求得朝圣神山的“钥匙”。拐进红坡村，时间变得稠密而缓慢：学做糌粑，青稞粉从指缝漏下；品去年雪水、今年青稞酿成的青稞酒；在白玛家的藏族家宴里，吃出久违的家的味道。神山脚下的避世村落与遗世独立的红坡寺，都在诉说下一次还要再来。
experiences.desc_en: At the Quden Pagoda, follow the pilgrims three clockwise circuits to earn the 'key' to the sacred mountain. Turn into Hongpo Village and time thickens and slows: learn to make tsampa, barley flour slipping through your fingers; taste barley wine of 'last year's snowmelt and this year's grain'; and at a Tibetan family feast in the home of Pema, rediscover the taste of home. The secluded village at the mountain's foot and the solitary Hongpo Monastery both whisper that you must return.

experiences.title_zh: 英力士掷弹兵 · 金沙江峡谷越野
experiences.title_en: Ineos Grenadier — Off-Road Through the Jinsha Gorge
experiences.desc_zh: 全程由硬派越野英力士掷弹兵随行，配备司机兼行程领队、藏地原生向导。它在214国道的褶皱里穿行，澎湃动力、强悍四驱与卓越通过性，在云南的蓝天白云与层峦叠嶂间碾过碎石、攀爬土坡、趟过溪流，将复杂地形一一征服，释放内心深处的探索野性。
experiences.desc_en: Throughout the journey, the rugged Ineos Grenadier accompanies you, with a driver who doubles as expedition leader and a native Tibetan guide. Threading the folds of Highway 214, its surging power, hard four-wheel drive and superb capability conquer gravel, earthen slopes and stream crossings amid Yunnan's blue skies and layered ridges — releasing the wild spirit of exploration within.

food.desc_zh: 用心挑选高原食材，信任主厨的手艺、味觉与审美，理念简单而纯粹，每个细节都成为体验的一部分；餐后篝火舞动，让身体由内而外温暖。
food.desc_en: Highland ingredients chosen with care and entrusted to the chef's craft, palate and eye — a philosophy at once simple and pure, where every detail becomes part of the experience. After dinner, dancing by the bonfire warms you from the inside out.

food.desc_zh: 抵达赛朵游牧时奉上的第一杯，“先认识这里的阳光和风土”，是高原待客的温暖开场。
food.desc_en: The first bowl offered on arrival at Saiduo Nomad — 'first, meet the sunlight and soil of this place' — a warm highland welcome.

food.desc_zh: 源自世界仅存的玫瑰蜜葡萄藤，在海拔2000米的干热河谷中以古法酿造，承载着一段中西交融的酿酒往事。
food.desc_en: Made from the world's last Rose Honey vines, crafted by old-world methods in the dry-hot valley at 2,000 metres — a glass that carries the story of East-meeting-West winemaking.

food.name_zh: 红坡村藏族家宴 · 糌粑与青稞酒
food.name_en: Hongpo Tibetan Family Feast — Tsampa & Barley Wine
food.desc_zh: 在白玛家亲手学做糌粑，配上“去年的雪水、今年的青稞”酿成的青稞酒，一桌藏族家宴吃出久违的家的味道。
food.desc_en: Learn to make tsampa by hand in Pema's home, paired with barley wine of 'last year's snowmelt and this year's grain' — a family feast that tastes of home.

items_zh: 香格里拉匠庐·赛朵游牧、梅里雪山匠庐·雾浓顶各连住2晚
默认安排2位成人共享一间标准间或大床房，所含客房随机安排，如有偏好请提前咨询，以实际资源为准
赛朵游牧：庭院阳台标间/大床房；侧海景阳台大床
雾浓顶：南仁·雪山观景露台双床房、热丁·雪山观景露台双床房、亚贡·雪山观景大床房/双床房
items_en: 2 consecutive nights each at JiangLu Saiduo Nomad and JiangLu Wunongding
Two adults sharing one standard or king room by default; room type assigned at random — please advise preferences in advance, subject to availability
Saiduo Nomad: courtyard-terrace standard/king rooms; side lake-view terrace king
Wunongding: Nanren snow-view terrace twin, Reding snow-view terrace twin, Yagong snow-view king/twin

items_zh: 全程英力士掷弹兵随行，配备司机兼行程领队服务
藏地原生向导全程随行
items_en: Ineos Grenadier throughout, with a driver who also serves as expedition leader
Native Tibetan guide accompanying the full journey

items_zh: Day1晚餐、Day2/3/4早中晚三餐、Day5早餐，共4早7正餐
酒店内下午茶、晚安甜品/夜粥、应季欢迎水果、minibar零食饮品
items_en: Day 1 dinner, full three meals on Days 2/3/4, Day 5 breakfast — 4 breakfasts and 7 main meals in total
In-lodge afternoon tea, evening sweets / night congee, seasonal welcome fruit, and minibar snacks and drinks

items_zh: 行程所列在地体验项目及首道门票
赛朵游牧店内体验：煨桑祈福、酥油茶制作、围炉夜话、红酒品鉴、藏装体验（赠3张简修照片）、藏文拓印、手工藏香
雾浓顶店内体验：煨桑祈福、拓印经幡、藏装体验、围炉夜话、手工咖啡皂、手工藏香
items_en: All in-destination experiences listed in the itinerary and first-entry tickets

Saiduo Nomad activities: sang blessing ritual, butter-tea making, fireside evening talks, wine tasting, Tibetan-dress experience (3 lightly-retouched photos gifted), Tibetan script rubbing, handmade Tibetan incense
Wunongding activities: sang blessing ritual, prayer-flag rubbing, Tibetan-dress experience, fireside evening talks, handmade coffee soap, handmade Tibetan incense

items_zh: 行程中旅游意外险，保额50万元；如需更高保额可自行投保
items_en: Travel accident insurance during the trip, covering up to RMB 500,000; higher coverage may be purchased independently

exclusions_zh: 从出发地到行程目的地之间的往返大交通（机票/火车票）
单房差：默认2成人入住一间，如出行人数为单数、需单人单住或儿童需单独占床，单住人员需补单房差
超重行李托运费、保管费；酒店内快递收发、传真、收费电视、饮品、烟酒等个人消费；自由活动期间的用车与陪同服务
因违约、自身过错、自由活动期间个人行为或自身疾病引起的人身和财产损失
因不可抗力等客观原因及航班延误或取消等特殊情况产生的额外费用
exclusions_en: Long-haul transport between your origin and the destination (flights / train tickets)
Single-room supplement: two adults per room by default; guests in odd numbers, requiring single occupancy, or with children needing a separate bed must pay the supplement
Excess-baggage and storage fees; in-lodge courier, fax, pay-TV, drinks, tobacco and alcohol and other personal spending; transport and escort during free time
Loss of person or property arising from breach of contract, personal fault, individual conduct during free time, or one's own illness
Extra costs arising from force majeure or other objective causes, and from flight delays or cancellations
pricing_notes_zh: 售价为6-8人拼团出行的单人价格；报名人数需满足发团数后方可发团。为避免损失，请先联系客服确认成团，再购买机票、车票等大交通
单男/单女无法与他人同住一间房需单独占床时，需补单房差4500元/人
其他出行人数的价格请咨询客服
pricing_notes_en: The price is per person based on a shared 6–8 guest group; departures run only once the minimum is met. To avoid losses, please confirm departure with our team before booking flights or train tickets
Solo male/female travellers unable to share a room and requiring single occupancy pay a single-room supplement of RMB 4,500 per person
For other group sizes, please consult our team
cancellation_zh: 旅行产品须支付全款方可确认预订，一经预约：
行程开始前15天及以上（不含出发当天）：可申请无损取消及退款
行程开始前8-14天（不含出发当天）：取消需收取订单金额的30%作为临时取消损失
行程开始前0-7天（不含出发当天）：取消需收取订单金额的50%作为临时取消损失
cancellation_en: Bookings are confirmed only upon full payment. Once reserved:
15 or more days before departure (excluding the departure day): cancel for a full refund with no penalty
8–14 days before departure (excluding the departure day): cancellation incurs a charge of 30% of the order value
0–7 days before departure (excluding the departure day): cancellation incurs a charge of 50% of the order value
tips_zh: 出行前请带齐身份证或其他有效证件，并提前检查是否在有效期内
香格里拉海拔约3300米，根据自身情况可于行程前一周开始服用红景天等；抵达高原后避免剧烈运动，前两天尽量不洗澡
高原早晚温差大，建议准备长袖保暖薄打底、防风防水冲锋衣、速干短袖、便于行动的休闲装与防滑防水徒步鞋
按需自备充电宝、充电线、耳机、护肤品，以及适合自身的常用药（感冒药、退烧贴、肠胃药、晕车药等）
高原紫外线强，备好防晒霜、润唇润肤用品、墨镜与帽子等
此行进入藏族文化浓厚的香格里拉，拍摄人物及在宗教、表演场所时请保持礼貌与尊重，尊重当地习俗，尽量不干扰他人
tips_en: Bring your ID card or other valid documents and check they are within their validity period before departure

Shangri-La sits at around 3,300 metres; depending on your condition you may begin taking rhodiola about a week before the trip. Avoid strenuous activity on arrival and try not to bathe for the first two days
Temperature swings between day and night are large; pack warm long-sleeved base layers, a windproof/waterproof shell, quick-dry tees, comfortable casual wear and non-slip waterproof hiking shoes
Bring as needed a power bank, charging cables, earphones, skincare and your usual medications (cold remedies, fever patches, stomach and motion-sickness medicine, etc.)
Highland UV is intense — pack sunscreen, lip and skin balm, sunglasses and a hat

This journey enters a deeply Tibetan region; please be courteous and respectful when photographing people and within religious or performance venues, honour local customs, and avoid disturbing others even where photography is allowed

faq.q_zh: 香格里拉海拔多高？应如何应对高原反应？
faq.q_en: How high is Shangri-La, and how should I prepare for altitude?
faq.a_zh: 香格里拉海拔约3300米，部分行程点位更高。建议根据自身情况于出行前一周开始服用红景天等，抵达后避免剧烈运动，前两天尽量不洗澡，多休息、多补水。本行程节奏从容，专为慢饮慢行设计，并有藏地向导全程随行。
faq.a_en: Shangri-La sits at about 3,300 metres, with some stops higher still. We suggest starting rhodiola about a week before travel if appropriate, avoiding strenuous activity on arrival, skipping bathing for the first two days, resting well and staying hydrated. The itinerary is deliberately unhurried — built for slow travel — with a native Tibetan guide alongside throughout.

faq.q_zh: 这条线路适合带孩子或不饮酒的人参加吗？
faq.q_en: Is this route suitable for children or non-drinkers?
faq.a_zh: 因香格里拉属高海拔地带，且这是一条以葡萄酒为主题、行程涉及品酒的线路，未满18周岁不建议报名。不饮酒的旅人同样可以参与，茨中教堂、梅里日照金山、煨桑祈福、藏民家访等人文与自然体验同样精彩。
faq.a_en: Because of the high altitude and the wine-focused nature of the journey, which includes tastings, we do not recommend it for travellers under 18. Non-drinkers are very welcome — the cultural and natural experiences, from Cizhong Church and Meili's golden sunrise to the sang ritual and Tibetan home visit, are just as rewarding.

faq.q_zh: 最佳出行季节是什么时候？团队规模有多大？
faq.q_en: When is the best time to travel, and how large is the group?
faq.a_zh: 最佳期为3-5月葡萄萌芽期与9-10月采收季。每次仅接待6-8位懂得慢饮的旅人，为小团尊享体验；需满足发团人数后方可发团，建议先与客服确认成团再购买大交通。
faq.a_en: The best windows are the budbreak of March–May and the harvest of September–October. Each departure hosts just 6–8 like-minded slow-travel guests for an intimate experience; departures require a minimum group, so please confirm with our team before booking long-haul transport.

faq.q_zh: 行程中的红酒庄园具体有哪些？
faq.q_en: Which wine estates does the journey visit?
faq.a_zh: 行程探访三处代表性酒庄：高海拔雷司令白葡的标杆朵木杦庄、中国藏式车库酒庄扎西核桃树酒庄，以及藏地百年酿酒源地茨中葡萄酒之家——后者使用世界仅存的玫瑰蜜葡萄藤，并保留百年地下酒窖、传教士酿酒器具与发酵木桶。
faq.a_en: The trip explores three signature estates: Domu Estate, a benchmark for high-altitude Riesling; the Tashi Walnut Tree Estate, a Tibetan-style 'garage winery'; and the Cizhong House of Wine, cradle of a century of Tibetan winemaking — home to the world's last Rose Honey vines, with its century-old cellar, missionary winemaking tools and fermentation barrels still preserved.

closing_zh: 这一趟，从香格里拉的旷野出发，在高原酒庄的微醺里落脚。雪山、田园、教堂与葡萄园相映成趣，山海辽阔，酒香绵长，信仰与风土在此共生。旅途在此刻终结，但关于自由的想象，永不散场。
closing_en: This journey sets out from the wild expanse of Shangri-La and comes to rest in the gentle intoxication of its highland estates. Snow mountains, farmland, church and vineyard play off one another; the land runs vast and the wine lingers long, faith and terroir growing side by side. The journey ends here — but the dream of freedom never closes.
poster_image: 探访雪山之间的村落红酒庄园.jpg
